mapper.select:
SELECT q.*, e.EMPID, e.LOCAL_NAME FROM HR_QUALIFICATION q INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE e ON q.PERSON_ID = e.PERSON_ID WHERE q.ACTIVITY = 1 AND e.ACTIVITY = 1
AND e.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%'
AND e.LOCAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{localName} || '%'
AND q.QUAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{qualName} || '%'
ORDER BY q.DATE_OBTAINED DESC
SELECT q.*, e.EMPID, e.LOCAL_NAME FROM HR_QUALIFICATION q LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE e ON q.PERSON_ID = e.PERSON_ID WHERE q.QUAL_NO = #{qualNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HR_QUALIFICATION ( QUAL_NO, PERSON_ID, QUAL_NAME, DATE_OBTAINED, QUAL_CARD_NO, QUAL_INSTITUTE, VALIDITY_DATE, ACQUISITION_MODES, QUAL_LEVEL, PAYMENTALLOWANCE_Y_N, QUAL_REMARK, QUAL_GRADE, QUAL_SUBMIT_DATE, QUAL_NAME_CODE, QUAL_GRADE_CODE, FILE_NAME, FILE_URL, ORDERNO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( hr_qualification_apply_seq.NEXTVAL, #{personId}, #{qualName}, #{dateObtained}, #{qualCardNo}, #{qualInstitute}, #{validityDate}, #{acquisitionModes}, #{qualLevel}, #{paymentAllowanceYN}, #{qualRemark}, #{qualGrade}, #{qualSubmitDate}, #{qualNameCode}, #{qualGradeCode}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{orderNo}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{createdIp}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_QUALIFICATION SET QUAL_NAME = #{qualName}, DATE_OBTAINED = #{dateObtained}, QUAL_CARD_NO = #{qualCardNo}, QUAL_INSTITUTE = #{qualInstitute}, VALIDITY_DATE = #{validityDate}, ACQUISITION_MODES = #{acquisitionModes}, QUAL_LEVEL = #{qualLevel}, PAYMENTALLOWANCE_Y_N = #{paymentAllowanceYN}, QUAL_REMARK = #{qualRemark}, QUAL_GRADE = #{qualGrade}, QUAL_SUBMIT_DATE = #{qualSubmitDate}, QUAL_NAME_CODE = #{qualNameCode}, QUAL_GRADE_CODE = #{qualGradeCode}, FILE_NAME = #{fileName}, FILE_URL = #{fileUrl}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{updatedIp} WHERE QUAL_NO = #{qualNo}
